verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: The Prophet frowned and turned away
verse.verse_2: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting].
verse.verse_3: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified
verse.verse_4: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?
verse.verse_5: As for he who thinks himself without need,
verse.verse_7: And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified.
verse.verse_8: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]
verse.verse_11: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;
verse.verse_12: So whoever wills may remember it.
verse.verse_17: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.
verse.verse_18: From what substance did He create him?
verse.verse_19: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him;
verse.verse_20: Then He eased the way for him;
verse.verse_21: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him.
verse.verse_22: Then when He wills, He will resurrect him.
verse.verse_23: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.
verse.verse_24: Then let mankind look at his food -
verse.verse_25: How We poured down water in torrents,
verse.verse_26: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts],
verse.verse_27: And caused to grow within it grain
verse.verse_32: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock.
verse.verse_33: But when there comes the Deafening Blast
verse.verse_34: On the Day a man will flee from his brother
verse.verse_35: And his mother and his father
verse.verse_36: And his wife and his children,
verse.verse_37: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him.
verse.verse_38: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright -
verse.verse_40: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust.
verse.verse_42: Those are the disbelievers, the wicked ones.
